---
title: "Resume"
body-classes: page-resume
---

## Education

**Master of Business Administration (MBA)**  
*University Canada West – Vancouver, BC*  
Expected Completion: April 2026  
*(Focus: Business Analytics and Strategic Decision-Making)*

---

## Professional Experience

### Landscaping Technician
**Cedar Creek Property Services** | *Vancouver, BC*  
- Delivered property maintenance services while maintaining high-quality standards.
- Strengthened teamwork, time management, and client-focused communication skills.

### Back Office Executive
**Seagal Laminate** | *India*  
- Managed documentation, order coordination, and reporting processes.
- Supported operational workflow efficiency and administrative accuracy.

---

### Download Resume
<a href="Vasu_Ramoliya_Resume.pdf" download class="btn btn-success" style="background-color: #6ee7b7; color: #1a2f23; border: none; font-weight: bold; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px;">
  &#128196; Download Full Resume (PDF)
</a>
